item.title: Welcome
item.description:
Hello, and welcome.

This is a place for practical fixes, small opinions, and things worked out with the help of LLMs. Expect short, useful posts — the kind of thing I’d otherwise leave in a scratch file and forget about: a fix for some annoying bug, an opinion I want to write down before I lose it, or a walkthrough of something I puzzled out with an LLM sitting next to me.
